title: Crispy Syrian Bean Stir-fry
description: A crowd-pleasing Syrian dish featuring fermented beans with a crunchy texture and subtle green cardamom flavor. Plant-based-friendly.

ingredients.name: Green cardamom pods
ingredients.notes: Ground for a more flavorful paste or whole for a strong flavor

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic, sauté for about 2 minutes until softened.
Stir in red pepper flakes and green cardamom pods. Cook for another minute.
Add fermented beans to the pan, tossing gently to coat with oil.
Drizzle lemon juice over the mixture, stirring well to incorporate.
Season with salt to taste. Serve immediately.
